rerun::external::re_renderer::external::bytemuck::__core::marker

Trait Destruct

Source 
pub trait Destruct { }
🔬This is a nightly-only experimental API. (const_destruct)
Expand description

A marker for types that can be dropped.

This should be used for ~const bounds, as non-const bounds will always hold for every type.
